title: More Menu
heading: Organisation Chart
text:
# Organisation Chart

District Magistrate is the head of the district administration and head to look after the rural development activities in the district. Superintendent of Police is the head of Police department to look after the law and order in the district. District West is sub divided in nine blocks and three sub-divisions. Nine Blocks are headed by Block Development Officers and three sub-divisions are headed by Sub-Divisional Magistrates.
Chart : General Administration & Head of Departments.
